allow:
Bash(cat > /mnt/d/meeting_intelligence/.env << 'EOF'
# AI Meeting Assistant - Environment Configuration
# 在这里填写你的 API Key，每次运行会自动加载

# Zhipu AI \(GLM\) API Key
# 获取地址: https://open.bigmodel.cn/usercenter/apikeys
ZHIPU_API_KEY=你的智谱API密钥

# OpenAI API Key \(可选\)
# 获取地址: https://platform.openai.com/api-keys
# OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-xxx

# Anthropic API Key \(可选\)
# 获取地址: https://console.anthropic.com/
# ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-xxx

# Default LLM provider: openai, anthropic, or glm
DEFAULT_LLM_PROVIDER=glm

# Default model
DEFAULT_LLM_MODEL=glm-4-flash
EOF
echo "✓ 已创建 .env 文件")
Bash(ps -fp 47526 && kill 47526 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; ps -fp 47526 2>/dev/null || echo "进程已终止")
Bash(curl -s "https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4/rate_limit" -H "Authorization: Bearer $ZHIPU_API_KEY" 2>/dev/null || echo "无法查询配额状态")
